529 O0400C6_PT_END_DT O0400C6_PT_END_DT O0400C6 Physical Therapy End Date CHAR 8 The data in this column indicates the end date for the most recent physical therapy. discontinued 09/30/2025
530 O0400D1_RT_MIN_NUM O0400D1_RT_MIN_NUM O0400D1 Respiratory Therapy Minutes Number CHAR 4 The data in this column indicates the total number of minutes that respiratory therapy was administered to the resident in the last seven days. discontinued 09/30/2025
